ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parliamentary_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI linking to the official resource for the question */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was answered */,
  "answering_body" TEXT /* Department responsible for answering the question */,
  "date_tabled" TEXT /* Date when the question was tabled */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the parliamentary question */,
  "tabling_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who tabled the question */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the parliamentary question */,
  "uin" INTEGER /* Unique identification number for the question */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the question (e.g., Open, In Review, Answered) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the question belongs to */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the question */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the question was updated */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Source document or file where the question was originally tabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parliamentary_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES question_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parliamentary_questions_tabling_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("tabling_member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "biography_info" TEXT /* Biography information for the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party the member belongs to */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* Constituency the member represents */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., MP, Lord) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response provided */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., Written, Oral, Supplementary) */,
  "response_format" TEXT /* Format of the response (e.g., Text, PDF, Video) */,
  "response_source" TEXT /* Source document or file where the response is stored */,
  "response_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who provided the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES parliamentary_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member receiving the notification */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS, Push Notification) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Failed) */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the notification (e.g., message content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword associated with a question */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the keyword */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the keyword to the question (e.g., 1 to 10) */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES parliamentary_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Environment, Trade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
